channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [ELANTAS] Elantas Beck India to hold 70th AGM on May 12, 2026; recommends ₹7.50 dividend
item.description:
Elantas Beck India Limited announced its 70th Annual General Meeting (AGM) will be held virtually on Tuesday, May 12, 2026, at 10:30 a.m. IST. The Board has recommended a dividend of ₹7.50 per equity share (75%) for the year ended December 31, 2025. The record date for dividend entitlement and AGM purposes is Tuesday, May 05, 2026. The dividend, if declared at the AGM, will be paid within 30 days to eligible members.

  • 70th Annual General Meeting (AGM) scheduled for May 12, 2026.
  • AGM to be held virtually via VC/OAVM facility.
  • Board recommended a dividend of ₹7.50 per equity share (75%) for FY25.
  • Record date for dividend and AGM entitlement is May 05, 2026.
  • Dividend, if approved, will be paid within 30 days of the AGM.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ELANTAS BECK INDIA LTD.-$ | Category: AGM/EGM

item.title: [HEXT] Hexaware Board to Meet May 6 for Q1 FY26 Results
item.description:
Hexaware Technologies Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will convene a meeting on Wednesday, May 06, 2026. The primary agenda for this meeting is to consider and approve the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. The Board will also review the audit report from the Statutory Auditors pertaining to these results. This announcement is a standard regulatory disclosure ahead of quarterly earnings.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 6, 2026.
  • To approve Q1 FY26 audited financial results.
  • Includes standalone and consolidated results.
  • Statutory Auditors' report will be considered.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Hexaware Technologies Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [ELANTAS] Elantas Beck India Sets Record Date for ₹7.50 Dividend & 70th AGM
item.description:
Elantas Beck India Ltd has announced Tuesday, May 5, 2026, as the Record Date for its 70th Annual General Meeting (AGM) and for determining shareholders eligible for a dividend. The Board has proposed a dividend of ₹7.50 per equity share of face value ₹10 each for the financial year 2025. This dividend is subject to approval by shareholders at the 70th AGM, scheduled for Tuesday, May 12, 2026. If approved, the dividend will be paid within 30 days from the date of the AGM.

  • Record date for 70th AGM and dividend is May 5, 2026.
  • Proposed dividend of ₹7.50 per equity share for FY2025.
  • Dividend payment contingent on shareholder approval at May 12, 2026 AGM.
  • Approved dividend will be paid within 30 days of the AGM.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ELANTAS BECK INDIA LTD.-$ | Category: Dividend

item.title: [IKS] IKS Health launches MyCareHub AI platform; boosts collections by 4.7%
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Inventurus Knowledge Solutions Ltd's IKS Health has launched MyCareHubTM, a first-of-its-kind agentic AI platform designed to automate and personalize patient engagement. Debuted at the 2026 American Medical Group Association Annual Conference, the platform integrates with Epic and uses a multi-agent behavioral algorithm to transform patient interactions. A pilot implementation at OrthoNY, a leading orthopedic practice, demonstrated significant financial improvements since its 2025 rollout. Data shows a 4.7% increase in total patient collections, a 9.4% increase in patient payments per visit, and an 8.25% increase in net payments per visit. The platform aims to enhance patient experience, drive adherence, and improve financial sustainability for healthcare organizations by leveraging behavioral modeling and decision intelligence.

  • IKS Health launched MyCareHubTM, an agentic AI platform for patient engagement.
  • The platform is integrated with Epic and uses advanced AI for personalized care.
  • Pilot at OrthoNY showed a 4.7% increase in total patient collections.
  • Patient payments per visit increased by 9.4% and net payments by 8.25%.
  • Aims to enhance patient experience and financial sustainability for healthcare providers.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Inventurus Knowledge Solutions Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [MOLDTKPAC] Mold-Tek Packaging Board to Consider First Interim Dividend on Apr 20, 2026
item.description:
Mold-Tek Packaging Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting for Monday, April 20, 2026. The main agenda for this meeting is to consider and potentially approve the declaration of the First Interim Dividend for the Financial Year 2025-26. The company has also fixed Friday, April 24, 2026, as the record date for determining the eligibility of shareholders for this interim dividend, if declared. Furthermore, the trading window for the company's shares has been closed effective April 1, 2026, and will reopen 48 hours after the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, are declared.

  • Board meeting on April 20, 2026, to consider interim dividend.
  • Record date for dividend eligibility set for April 24, 2026.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026.
  • Closure is until 48 hours post Q4/FY26 results.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Mold-Tek Packaging Limited | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [MOLDTKPAC] Mold-Tek Board to consider FY26 First Interim Dividend on April 20
item.description:
Mold-Tek Packaging Ltd's Board of Directors is scheduled to meet on Monday, April 20, 2026, to consider and potentially approve the declaration of the First Interim Dividend for the Financial Year 2025-26. If the dividend is declared, the record date for determining eligible shareholders for payment has been fixed as Friday, April 24, 2026. The company's trading window has been closed since April 1, 2026, and will reopen 48 hours after the declaration of the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.

  • Board meeting on April 20, 2026, to consider interim dividend.
  • Record date for dividend eligibility set for April 24, 2026.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026, until Q4/FY26 results.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Mold-Tek Packaging Limited | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [MOLDTKPAC] Mold-Tek Packaging Board to consider interim dividend on April 20, 2026
item.description:
The Board of Directors of Mold-Tek Packaging Ltd is scheduled to meet on Monday, April 20, 2026, to consider the declaration of the First Interim Dividend for the Financial Year 2025-26. The record date for determining the eligibility of members for this potential interim dividend has been fixed as Friday, April 24, 2026. The company also confirmed that its trading window remains closed from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours after the declaration of audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.

  • Board meeting on April 20, 2026, to consider interim dividend.
  • Record date for interim dividend fixed as April 24, 2026.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026, until Q4 FY26 results.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Mold-Tek Packaging Limited | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [ZYDUSLIFE] Zydus Lifesciences' subsidiary GRPPL gets ₹1.66 Mn GST penalty dropped
item.description:
Zydus Lifesciences Ltd announced that its wholly-owned subsidiary, German Remedies Pharmaceuticals Private Limited (GRPPL), has successfully appealed a GST demand order. GRPPL had previously received an order imposing a penalty of ₹1.66 million for the financial year 2018-19, related to alleged excess Input Tax Credit availment. The Office of the Commissioner, Central GST, Appeal Ahmedabad Commissionerate, issued an Appeal Order dated April 1, 2026, which was received on April 15, 2026, dropping the entire penalty amount. Zydus Lifesciences stated that this development has no material impact on the financials, operations, or other activities of GRPPL or the Company.

  • GRPPL's ₹1.66 million GST penalty for FY19 has been dropped on appeal.
  • The appellate authority reversed the initial demand order.
  • This decision eliminates a potential financial liability for the subsidiary.
  • Company states no material impact on financials or operations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Zydus Lifesciences Ltd | Category: Tax & Penalty

item.title: [STLNETWORK] STL Networks Board to meet April 18 for fundraise via preferential issue
item.description:
STL Networks Ltd. has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting for April 18, 2026. The key agenda for this meeting is to consider a proposal for raising funds. The company plans to raise these funds through a preferential issue of equity shares, warrants, or convertible securities, targeting promoters and promoter group entities. This fund-raising initiative will be subject to all required regulatory and statutory approvals. Additionally, the trading window for dealing in the company's securities is already closed for designated persons and their immediate relatives, effective from April 1, 2026. This closure is in anticipation of the declaration of the Audited Financial Results for the financial year ended March 31, 2026, and will remain closed until 48 hours after the conclusion of the upcoming Board Meeting.

  • Board meeting scheduled for April 18, 2026.
  • To consider fundraise via preferential issue to promoters.
  • Funds to be raised through equity, warrants, or convertibles.
  • Trading window closed from April 1 for FY26 results.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: STL Networks Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [GTPL] GTPL Hathway FY26 Revenue up 7% to ₹37,466 Mn; Q4 Revenue ₹9,344 Mn
item.description:
🔥 Trending

GTPL Hathway Ltd announced its audited financial results for Q4 and FY26. For Q4 FY26, total revenue grew 4% Y-o-Y to ₹9,344 Mn, with EBITDA at ₹908 Mn (9.7% margin). For the full FY26, total revenue increased 7% annually to ₹37,466 Mn, and broadband revenue grew 2%. FY26 EBITDA stood at ₹4,321 Mn with an 11.5% margin. The board recommended a dividend of ₹2/- per share for FY26. Operationally, Digital Cable TV active subscribers were 9.40 Mn, and Broadband active subscribers increased by 15K Y-o-Y to 1.06 Mn. The company also launched 'GTPL Infinity', a HITS platform.

  • FY26 total revenue grew 7% annually to ₹37,466 Mn.
  • Q4 FY26 total revenue increased 4% Y-o-Y to ₹9,344 Mn.
  • FY26 EBITDA was ₹4,321 Mn with an 11.5% margin.
  • Board recommended a dividend of ₹2/- per share for FY26.
  • Broadband subscribers increased by 15K Y-o-Y to 1.06 Mn.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GTPL Hathway Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result
